affectedIntegrations.description: API version 2024-12-18 removes the Sources API endpoint your integration uses
Invoice amounts may not include new tax fields from Stripe

priorityOrder.item: Update Stripe API version in payment service
Update Xero sync to handle new tax fields

migrationSteps: Update Stripe SDK to latest version
Replace Sources API calls with Payment Intents API
Update webhook handlers for new event format
workarounds: Pin current API version temporarily while migrating
Contact Stripe support for extension if needed
nextStepSuggestion: Get help with the upgrade process.
nextStepDescription: Use Upgrade Assistant for a detailed migration plan for the Stripe API update.
